gold_intro_1: Igolide lisetshenziselwe njengomali izinkulungwane zeminyaka futhi libhekwa ngabaningi njengendawo ephephile yezezimali.
gold_intro_2: I-Bitcoin iyimali yedijithali eyasungulwa ngo-2009 futhi ibhekwa ngabaningi njengendawo ephephile yezezimali.
gold_intro_3: Kodwa insimbi yengokoqobo efana negolide ihluke kanjani emalini yedijithali efana ne-Bitcoin? Ake sibheke umehluko phakathi kwezinhlobo ezimbili zemali: I-Bitcoin & Igolide.
point_1_summary_1: Ngoba i-Bitcoin iyidijithali, ingathunyelelwa ngokushesha cishe ngezimali eziphansi kakhulu yinoma ubani onokuxhumana ne-Inthanethi. Ngoba igolide lingokoqobo, alikwazi ukuhamba nge-Inthanethi futhi kumele lithunyelwe ngokwenyama ukuze kudluliselwe ubunini.
point_2_summary_1: I-Bitcoin iyinto yedijithali ngokwemvelo, okusho ukuthi ungadlulisela ubunini obuphelele ngayo nge-Inthanethi. Ezinye izinkampani zinikeza ithuba lokuthenga igolide ku-inthanethi ngaphandle kokuthola igolide lengokoqobo langempela, kunalokho uthembe inkampani ukuba ikugcinele igolide. Lokhu kufana ne-Digital IOU ngoba unobunini besithembiso kuphela esivela enkampanini esikhundleni sento uqobo.
point_3_summary_1: I-Bitcoin inomkhawulo oqinile wezinhlamvu ezingu-21 million BTC ezizokhona.
point_3_summary_2: Igolide elisha likhishwa emhlabathini unyaka ngamunye, okuholela ekunfleshinini yenani eliphelele. Kulinganiselwa ukuthi inani eliphelele legolide likhula ngamaphesenti angaba ngu-1.6% unyaka ngamunye, okusho ukuthi icesho lakho lephaya linciphile ngamaphesenti angu-1.6% unyaka ngamunye.
point_3_summary_3: Lokhu kungaphansi kwenfleshini ye-fiat, kodwa kusayinfleshini.
point_4_summary_1: Igolide linenani elinwebeka, okusho ukuthi njengoba intengo yegolide ikhula, kukhona ukukhuthaza okukhulu kokumba igolide elingaphezulu. Lokhu kuvame ukufaka ingcindezi yokwehla entengeweni yegolide njengoba amamayini amasha eqalisa.
point_4_summary_2: Nge-Bitcoin, noma intengo inyuka kangakanani, awukwazi ukwenza ngaphezu kwe-21M Bitcoin.
point_4_summary_3: I-Bitcoin iyinto yokuqala enobudlelwano obungalinwebeki phakathi kwentengo nenani.
point_5_summary_2: Amashumi ezinkulungwane ama-node azimele aqinisekisa imithetho yenethiwekhi.
point_5_summary_3: Abasebenzisi bangathatha ubunini be-Bitcoin yabo ngokulanda uhlelo lokusebenza.
point_5_summary_4: Nakuba kungenzeka ukuzigcinela igolide lengokoqobo, igolide lengokoqobo eliningi ligcinwa emathangi amakhulu aphethwe abagcini okwenza licentralized ngokwenyama.
point_6_summary_1: Nge-Bitcoin, kulula kakhulu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi unayo i-Bitcoin yangempela ngokuzigcinela izinhlamvu zakho futhi usebenzise i-full node.
point_6_summary_3: I-full node iyisoftware elula eqinisekisa ukuthi imithetho yenethiwekhi iyalandelwa, futhi iqinisekisa ukuthi unayo i-Bitcoin yangempela.
point_6_summary_4: Igolide lengokoqobo lingaba nzima kakhulu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi iqiniso. Ngisho noma uqinisekisa ukuthi ingxenye yangaphandle yegolide lengokoqobo iyiqiniso, ingaphakathi legolide lakho lengokoqobo lingaba yi-Tungsten noma enye insimbi engasilo igolide. Indlela yokuqinisekisa ngempela ukuthi unegolide lengokoqobo ocabanga ukuthi unalo ukuyincibilikisa.
point_7_summary_1: Njengoba kunamasenti angu-100 kudola eli-1, kunama-satoshi angu-100,000,000 ku-Bitcoin e-1. Lokhu kuvumela i-Bitcoin isetshenziswe kuzo zonke izilinganiso zokuthenga, kufaka phakathi izinkokhelo ezincane kakhulu njengamasenti ambalwa.
point_7_summary_2: Lokhu kwenza i-Bitcoin ibe enhle ebhizinisini.
point_7_summary_3: Ngoba igolide lengokoqobo linzima ukuhlukanisa, alikwazi ukusetshenziswa kalula ekuthengeni, ikakhulukazi ekuthengeni okuncane.
